title: Atlas Connection Graph
description: Directed graph of how projects connect, produced by detect-connections from a manifest.

manifestRef.description: Path (relative to this file) to the manifest.json this graph was built from.

nodes.description: One node per manifest project, plus one per discovered external system.

id.description: For projects, the manifest project id. For externals, 'external:<slug>' (e.g. 'external:stripe').

from.description: Source node id. For sync calls this is the caller; for async this is the producer.

to.description: Target node id. For sync calls this is the callee; for async this is the consumer.

sync.description: sync = request/response (http, grpc, graphql, import, db). async = fire-and-forget / event-driven (queue, webhook).

channel.description: The concrete conduit, when meaningful: route path, gRPC method, queue subject/topic, env-var name, or table name.

label.description: Short human label for diagrams (defaults to protocol if absent).

confidence.description: How sure the resolver is that this edge is real and points at the right target.

evidence.description: Where this edge was inferred from. Keep at least one entry so refresh-vault and humans can audit it.

file.description: Absolute path to the source file.

snippet.description: Short quoted line showing the call/import/config.
